violations.text: Working containers of sugar are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The rinse bay drain stopper for the 3-bay sink was observed in poor repair, not holding water properly. Equipment must be in good repair. The 1 door lowboy gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The coving in the drive thru and dry storage area is in poor repair, observed tiles being held together with tape and lacking a proper seal. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024

Non-functional equipment (low boy refrigerator) was observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2024
